differential_diagnoses: Systemic Lupus Erythematosus with Lupus Nephritis
Primary Membranous Nephropathy with secondary Renal Vein Thrombosis
next_steps: Perform comprehensive serologic evaluation: ANA, dsDNA, complement levels (C3/C4), and ANCA titers
Perform an echocardiogram (TTE/TEE) to rule out endocarditis and evaluate for right heart strain
Initiate therapeutic anticoagulation for bilateral renal vein thrombosis and pulmonary embolism
Perform an ultrasound-guided renal biopsy (once anticoagulated/stable)
Perform blood and sputum cultures, and viral respiratory panel
Monitor renal function, electrolytes, and urine protein-to-creatinine ratio
